name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.13.13 CRITICAL HOTFIX: bumps ooxml-swift to v0.19.13 — reverts v0.19.12's TIER-0 over-fix that broke <w:del> round-trip. v3.13.12 (DO NOT USE) silently stripped deleted-text content from every <w:del> save because adding 'delText' to recognizedRunChildren removed delText from rawElements, triggering writer's synthetic-emission gate to emit empty <w:delText></w:delText>. R2 + R5 + Codex INDEPENDENTLY confirmed in 6-AI verify. v3.13.13 reverts that change and uses includeDelText: false parameter on advanceWhitespaceCounter to prevent double-advance without removing delText from rawElements. New testDelTextContentPreservedThroughRoundTrip asserts actual content (not just opening-tag count) survives. Methodology lesson (5th refinement): when fixing counter-desync via 'skip element from raw-capture path', verify WRITER still has access to content via SOMEWHERE; tests must assert end-to-end content preservation, not opening-tag counts or in-memory state. Operationalize: split tests into counter-parity (tag counts) AND payload-parity (content) — Codex finding. v3.13.12 (DO NOT USE — stripped <w:del> content) v3.13.11 sub-stack B-CONT (boundary check + 7 raw-capture sites + delText overlay + entity-decode + comments-trim removal). v3.13.10 sub-stack B initial WhitespaceOverlay implementation. v3.13.11: bumps ooxml-swift to v0.19.11 — sub-stack B-CONT (boundary check + 7 raw-capture sites + delText overlay + entity-decode + comments-trim removal). v3.13.10: bumps ooxml-swift to v0.19.10 — sub-stack B initial WhitespaceOverlay implementation (covers all 6 <w:t>-bearing parts). v3.13.10: bumps ooxml-swift to v0.19.10 — sub-stack B of #58/#59/#60 closes #59 initial WhitespaceOverlay implementation (covers all 6 <w:t>-bearing parts). v3.13.9: bumps ooxml-swift to v0.19.9 — A-CONT-3 mini-cycle of #58 closes 3 P0 from sub-stack A-CONT-2 6-AI verify INCLUDING SILENT CORRECTNESS REGRESSION (delete_bookmark for header/footer bookmarks was silently lost on disk in v3.13.8 — must-upgrade). Plus list_bookmarks now surfaces paragraph-level container bookmarks; insert_bookmark detects duplicate names across all 5 part types. Sub-cycle 4 for #58 (A → A-CONT → A-CONT-2 → A-CONT-3). Same convergence-cycle pattern as R5→R5-CONT-4 (5 sub-cycles for #56). v3.13.8: bumps ooxml-swift to v0.19.8 — A-CONT-2 mini-mini-cycle of #58 closes 2 P0 + 1 P1 from sub-stack A-CONT 6-AI verify (getBookmarks() now walks container bodyChildren across headers/footers/footnotes/endnotes; parseContainerChildBodyChildren now has 'case sdt' recursion mirroring parseBodyChildren; deleteBookmark() now symmetric with getBookmarks() — can delete names that getBookmarks() returns; matrix-pin synthetic fixture catches container parser regressions for real). Sub-cycle 3 for #58 — same convergence-cycle pattern as R5→R5-CONT-4 (5 sub-cycles for #56). v3.13.7: bumps ooxml-swift to v0.19.7 — A-CONT mini-cycle of #58 closes 2 P0 from sub-stack A 6-AI verify (parseContainerChildBodyChildren parser asymmetry: body-level bookmarks in headers/footers/footnotes/endnotes were still silently dropped post-v3.13.6; getBookmarks() walker missed body-level entries). Same convergence-cycle pattern as R5-CONT-4 (#56): per-task gate caught one parser entry point; 6-AI verify caught the symmetric sibling. v3.13.6: bumps ooxml-swift to v0.19.6 + word-to-md-swift to v0.6.1 — closes #58 (sub-stack A of #58/#59/#60 document-content-preservation): body-level <w:bookmarkStart>/<w:bookmarkEnd> (TOC _Toc<digits> anchors that wrap multiple paragraphs) now survive body-mutating save via BodyChild enum extension under 'if not typed, preserve as raw' principle. Cross-cutting matrix-pin testDocumentContentEqualityInvariant lands with bookmarkStart count parity (45=45 thesis fixture); B (#59 whitespace overlay) + C (#60 RunProperties audit) ship in subsequent v3.13.7/v3.14.0. v3.13.5: bumps ooxml-swift to v0.19.5 — closes R5 stack-completion (6 P0 + 5 P1 + R5-CONT 7 P0 + 5 P1 + R5-CONT-2 5 P0 + 4 P1 + R5-CONT-3 1 P0 + 4 P1 + R5-CONT-4 1 P0 + 3 P1 from #56 rounds 4-8 verify) via spectra-driven per-task verify gates (no che-word-mcp source changes). v0.19.4 was held back per verify-gate. Round 4 (R5 stack): walker symmetry across headers/footers/footnotes/endnotes — accept_revision / reject_revision / accept_all_revisions / reject_all_revisions / get_hyperlinks / replace_text now find wrappers in all parts. Round 5 (R5-CONT): per-container relationships round-trip — update_hyperlink URL sync targets owning part rels not document-scope. Round 6 (R5-CONT-2): delete_hyperlink mirror + reject_revision .insertion source-routing + container <w:tbl> capture preserved. Round 7 (R5-CONT-3): reject_revision typed-case clearMarker (file persistence converges with API state). Round 8 (R5-CONT-4): accept_revision typed-case clearMarker (mirror) + matrix-pin asymmetry-guard removal + Document.repairContainerFileNames marks document.xml.rels + [Content_Types].xml dirty after rename. Convergence: Devil's Advocate wrote 5 adversarial tests targeting the convergence-cycle pattern; all PASSED. v3.13.4: bumps ooxml-swift to v0.19.4 — held back per verify-gate, content rolled into v3.13.5. v3.13.3: bumped ooxml-swift to v0.19.3 (8 P0 + 3 P1 from #56 round 2 verify). v3.13.2: F1-F4 round 1 verify hot-fix. v3.13.1: pPr double-emission hot-fix. v3.13.0: document.xml lossless round-trip (closes #56, P0). v3.12.0: Programmatic Track Changes generation (#45). v3.11.0: Tables / Hyperlinks / Headers (#49 #50 #51). v3.10.0: Styles + Numbering + Sections (#46 #47 #48). v3.9.0: Content Controls (SDT) read/write (#44).
